targetOwner: NONE_WITH_REASON: SCLP-X-T2's accepted repository-wide search (22,026 files, 16 queries, 500 raw hits, 329 unique path/line rows, zero ambiguous rows) found no non-test, non-type-only production caller connecting either MandatoryGateway/createMandatoryGateway (GC-009) or AgentExecutionRuntime (GC-010) to an execution channel; both symbols are constructed or invoked only inside their own co-located test files, and the package exports/files plus the root barrel module omit both.
missingEdge: GC-009 and GC-010 each define a governed runtime helper (MandatoryGateway/createMandatoryGateway; AgentExecutionRuntime) inside the Contract To Runtime plane, but the edge from either helper to a non-test production execution channel is unproven: no non-test caller constructs or invokes either symbol anywhere in the accepted T2 search universe.

impact: Both MandatoryGateway/createMandatoryGateway (GC-009) and AgentExecutionRuntime (GC-010) exist and are implemented and unit-tested, but no non-test production caller connects either helper to an execution channel. This is an architecture-discoverability gap recorded from accepted repository-wide search evidence, not a runtime defect claim, an enforcement-coverage claim, or an invocation-behavior claim.

closeCondition.conditionText: OPEN: a governed accepted artifact must prove non-test production caller ownership AND bounded invocation evidence for BOTH MandatoryGateway/createMandatoryGateway (GC-009) and AgentExecutionRuntime (GC-010) to fully close this paired entry. If evidence emerges for only one of the two helpers, that requires a reviewer-authored entry split or targeted update naming the still-open helper -- not a false whole-entry closure recorded against this stableId.

reopenCondition.conditionText: Reopen this entry, or any successor closure of it, if a future review finds the current non-test production caller or the current export/barrel surface removed or regressed on either EXTENSIONS/CVF_GUARD_CONTRACT/src/runtime/mandatory-gateway.ts or EXTENSIONS/CVF_GUARD_CONTRACT/src/runtime/agent-execution-runtime.ts after a later closure has been accepted.

actionOwner: PARKED_WITH_REASON: this GAP entry records the accepted no-caller finding only; it does not create a runtime caller itself. A fresh source-verified work packet is required to propose, implement, and prove a non-test production caller for either or both helpers before this entry can close.
